title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; chat, stream, and embed with local Ollama models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama models as first-class LLM and embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model manager, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoint).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Rust crate for chatting and embedding with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration and @OllamaTemplate for injecting chat/embedding clients.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper with markdown rendering, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# .NET client library for Ollama with async streaming and embedding support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible Ollama builds with CUDA and ROCm acceleration.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI copilot sidebar powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling and streaming.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama with conversation folders and model manager.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to deploy GPU-enabled Ollama on AWS EC2 with auto-shutdown to save costs.
